lastReleaseMessage: Docs drift-fix: DESIGN.md caught up with reality. No code...

items: Real-use testing and iterate cycles still pending (demo-seed harness now exists to unblock it: scripts/seed-demo.ps1)
Live payment integration on top of the v0.6.0 per-seat entitlement plumbing (Stripe checkout + webhooks; entitlement is computed but nothing is gated yet)

barRaise.topFinding: The v0.7.x quality pass is written and correct but unshipped: 7 modified files plus 2 untracked ones (including migration 0011) have sat uncommitted 2-plus days on the loss-prone FUSE mount, so nearly the whole 2026-07-02 action list is resolved in the working tree yet none of it exists at HEAD. The batch-write rewrite of schedule generate (apps/api/src/routes/schedule.ts) fixes both the O(N-squared) plus serial-round-trip cost and the partial-write risk, the user-list N+1 is gone via usersWithMembershipsBulk (apps/api/src/lib/users.ts), the open-shifts double correlated subquery is now one grouped LEFT JOIN, migration 0011 adds the audit_log(organization_id, created_at) composite the doc long claimed, and scripts/sync-audit-dashboard.ps1 closes the audit-pointer gap open since 2026-06-28. Health rises to 89 (was 88) and all five hard rules pass, so there is no BLOCK and the verdict holds at in-progress. But actionsClosed is 0 by design: nothing is counted closed until it lands, and the untracked migration on a mount this project's own CLAUDE.md documents as prone to eating files is the single most important thing to fix. The one high-priority action is to commit and release the pass; everything else (wire the audit-sync script into the nightly routine, refresh the stale YaE project pages, resolve the drive-vs-park posture) is downstream or deferred on a Nick decision.

actions.title: Commit and release the in-flight v0.7.x quality pass so untracked migration 0011, the schedule-generate batch rewrite, the usersWithMembershipsBulk N+1 fix, the open-shifts grouped-join fix, scripts/sync-audit-dashboard.ps1, and the DESIGN/CLAUDE doc updates land at HEAD and deploy (schema advances to 0011).

After committing scripts/sync-audit-dashboard.ps1, wire a call to it into the nightly audit routine so the dashboard audit pointer self-syncs between releases; it currently reads 2026-07-05 while docs/CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-07-13.md exists on disk.
Refresh X:\YesAndEverything\projects\scheduler\{index,design}.html from v0.4.x to the current v0.7.x surface (M7.1 org-switcher, v0.6.0 billing entitlement, migrations 0009/0010/0011).

deferred.title: Surface the drive-to-first-user-via-seed-demo vs re-park posture decision to Nick; both completion gates dead-end on it.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: posture (drive vs park)

deferred.title: Keep the live-payment build gated behind an explicit Stripe milestone commitment so entitlement work stops accreting ahead of revenue.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: commit to Stripe milestone

deferred.title: Record an explicit DESIGN section 23 decision on whether YaS is driven to first real user or re-parked.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: posture call
